methodology_notes: Double-blind survey of 8,000 private-sector security and business leaders across 30 markets, run by an independent third party. Aggregate global figures cited. Used here as both a distributional reference and a source of paired on-task calibration questions (see calibration-map SEED_POINTS).

distributions.context: Only 4% of organizations are at the 'Mature' tier of readiness needed to withstand modern cyber threats
34% are very confident in the resilience of their current cybersecurity infrastructure against attacks
89% use AI to better understand threats; AI adoption is widespread for detection and response
45% have the internal resources and expertise to conduct comprehensive AI security assessments
73% expect a cybersecurity incident to disrupt their business in the next 12 to 24 months
